basic_details.job_title: Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Manager, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Manager, Counselor, District Resource Person
basic_details.short_information: Pudukkottai District has released the official Project Manager, Counselor ,District Resource Person Notification 2026 on its official website. Have been announced under the Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as MSW, MA Sociology, and MSc Psychology can apply offline on or before 06 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form details are available below.

qualification.details: Project Manager, Counselor: MSW., MA., (Sociology), MSc., (Psychology) - Regular District Resource Person (Counselor): MSW, Regular

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Pudukkottai District Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
